principles: Reference images provide topology and shape semantics only; explicit dimensions and approved engineering data provide all coordinates.
A drawing is not accepted merely because every requested entity exists; contour continuity, tangency, manufacturability and annotation clearance are independent gates.
Every failed rule must emit phenomenon, root cause, corrective action and a persistent prevention rule.

rules.name: closed_single_contour
rules.requirement: CUT and SLOT edges form one connected closed ring; every contour node has degree 2.
rules.failure_cause: An edge was omitted, referenced before its endpoint existed, or rounded geometry used inconsistent tangent points.
rules.prevention: Build an endpoint graph before compilation and reject any connected-component count other than 1 or any node degree other than 2.

rules.name: line_arc_g1_tangency
rules.requirement: Every line-to-arc contour join is coincident within 1e-6 mm and tangent within 0.001 degree.
rules.failure_cause: A visual quarter-circle approximation was used instead of solving the exact fillet from the two incident rays.
rules.prevention: Compute tangent distance R/tan(theta/2), center distance R/sin(theta/2), and reject endpoint-only joins.

rules.name: no_duplicate_zero_or_self_intersection
rules.requirement: No duplicate entities, zero-length entities, gaps, or non-adjacent self-intersections are permitted.
rules.failure_cause: Independent per-edge generation did not run a global topology pass.
rules.prevention: Canonicalize geometry, sample arcs, merge the ring and require is_ring=true and is_simple=true.

rules.name: v_slot_pair_symmetry
rules.requirement: Each internal V slot consists of two mirrored sloped edges sharing the exact fold-line apex.
rules.failure_cause: Slots were represented as a single vertical line or two unrelated cuts.
rules.prevention: Generate both sides from one boundary station and one board-thickness-derived slot parameter; compare mirrored tangent points.

rules.name: dimension_source_separation
rules.requirement: Pixel coordinates and apparent image scale never drive CAD dimensions.
rules.failure_cause: Visual tracing conflated illustrative proportions with engineering dimensions.
rules.prevention: Store trusted numeric sources, visual-only semantics and derived review-only tooling parameters as separate fields in every job.

rules.name: dimension_chain_and_bbox
rules.requirement: Panel chain, flap depth, body height, closure formula and blank bounding box all reconcile exactly.
rules.failure_cause: Local feature edits changed global dimensions or used the misnamed inner-dimension field.
rules.prevention: Recompute global equations from final geometry after every contour change; design_result overrides misnamed geometry fields.

rules.name: annotation_clearance
rules.requirement: Required text remains readable and does not cross production geometry; header/callout text stays outside the blank unless it is a face label.
rules.failure_cause: Text was placed from fixed coordinates without checking its rendered bounding box.
rules.prevention: Approximate or render text extents, buffer production lines by 2 mm, and reject unintended intersections.

rules.name: autocad_normalization
rules.requirement: Equivalent circular angles such as 0 and 360 compare modulo 360; MTEXT newlines use \P; execution files stay ASCII.
rules.failure_cause: The verifier compared serialized representations rather than geometric equivalence, or emitted invalid Unicode command sequences.
rules.prevention: Normalize angles modulo 360 and normalize command-channel text before launching AutoCAD.

rules.name: save_reopen_persistence
rules.requirement: Layers, coordinates, arcs, Chinese MTEXT and AICAD XData survive a real AutoCAD save/reopen cycle.
rules.failure_cause: Portable DXF validation was incorrectly treated as proof of native DWG persistence.
rules.prevention: Run accoreconsole build, save, reopen and ID-by-ID verification as a mandatory final gate.

rules.name: semantic_reference_layer_separation
rules.requirement: Glue application geometry and tape-center reference geometry use different layers, colors and plot behavior.
rules.failure_cause: Two green centerlines reused GLUE merely because both features related to sealing, making their manufacturing meaning ambiguous.
rules.prevention: Map every auxiliary entity to a single manufacturing action; keep GLUE green and move non-production tape centerlines to gray non-plot TAPE_REFERENCE.

rules.name: frame_scale_space_separation
rules.requirement: Production geometry remains 1:1 in model space; the measured paper frame remains 1:1 in paper space; fitting is performed only by a locked viewport scale.
rules.failure_cause: Physically scaling the dieline to fit a frame would invalidate production coordinates, constraints and AICAD XData verification.
rules.prevention: Reject any framed delivery whose model-space production bounding box changes; require an explicit paper size, viewport ratio and locked viewport.

rules.name: single_viewport_and_full_coverage
rules.requirement: Each delivery layout contains exactly one active model viewport; its scale, lock, target/view center and visible model window cover the complete annotated drawing with margin.
rules.failure_cause: A layout template auto-created a viewport and MVIEW created another; later Target was added to an existing ViewCenter, shifting and cropping half the drawing although the numeric scale was correct.
rules.prevention: Delete duplicate model viewports, verify viewport count=1, compute the model-space visible rectangle from paper size/scale/center, require it to contain annotation extents, and perform an actual AutoCAD layout screenshot check.

rules.name: reference_frame_dimensional_match
rules.requirement: A user-supplied frame is measured from CAD entities and reproduced by exact outer, inner-margin and title-grid coordinates rather than visual approximation.
rules.failure_cause: The first generic A3 draft assumed left 20 mm and other margins 10 mm, while the supplied reference actually used left 25 mm and other margins 5 mm.
rules.prevention: Extract the reference DWG entity extents and title-line coordinates, persist them in a frame config, and compare every reproduced frame segment within 1e-6 mm.

rules.name: native_dimension_entities_and_methods
rules.requirement: Every displayed engineering size is carried by a native AutoCAD DIMENSION entity of the correct subtype and a named plot-scale dimension style; manual line-plus-text dimensions and numeric text overrides are forbidden.
rules.failure_cause: The drawing used native dimensions for only the outer chain while radius and manufacturing explanations remained ordinary MTEXT, so the sheet still looked manually annotated and could not be dimension-audited as one system.
rules.prevention: Require AcDbRotatedDimension for linear sizes and AcDbRadialDimension for radii, a named scale style, empty TextOverride, exact Measurement values, dimension XData IDs, and a DWG save/reopen subtype audit.

rules.name: title_block_semantic_fields_and_cell_fit
rules.requirement: Title-block cells contain drawing-relevant metadata, use the intended row/column semantics, and keep centered text extents inside their owning cells.
rules.failure_cause: Fields such as class, major, grade and student ID were copied from the reference example even though they were not metadata for this packaging drawing.
rules.prevention: Define a title-block field map before drawing; reject reference-example fields not requested by the user; verify required school/name/title/number/scale/date/unit/status/sheet/review values and rendered cell clearance.

rules.name: technical_notes_inside_frame
rules.requirement: General technical explanations live in a dedicated paper-space requirements panel inside the frame; model space retains only local face/flap labels that identify geometry.
rules.failure_cause: Header, process and review notes were scattered above, beside and below the model, expanding extents and making the drawing look like an annotated screenshot rather than a controlled sheet.
rules.prevention: Classify text as local geometry label, native dimension or general note; require all general notes in a bounded paper-space panel and require zero general-note MTEXT outside the frame.

rules.name: native_layout_plot_state
rules.requirement: The clean review preview is plotted from the named paper-space layout with TILEMODE=0, the expected A3 media and an opaque white rasterization.
rules.failure_cause: A test plot was launched after editing model space without switching TILEMODE back to paper space, producing a black and incomplete preview even though the DWG layout itself was correct.
rules.prevention: Before PlotToFile set TILEMODE=0 and CTAB explicitly, delete stale output, verify A3 page size, RGB white background and complete frame/title/model visibility.

rules.name: tuck_lock_closure_equations
rules.requirement: For a straight tuck-end carton, main-flap depth equals box width, dust-flap depth equals half the box width, the tongue has a positive insertion depth, and paired root reliefs separate the main and dust flaps.
rules.failure_cause: A visually plausible flap set can still jam, overrun the receiving panel or tear at a shared sharp root if closure equations are not checked globally.
rules.prevention: Compute and verify main_depth=W, dust_depth=W/2, tongue_depth>0, mirrored relief width and fold order before compiling any tuck-lock plan; reject geometric-only approximations.

rules.name: xdata_id_to_layer_persistence
rules.requirement: Every plugin entity maps from its AICAD XData ID to one literal manufacturing-layer pair, and the same mapping survives native DWG save/reopen.
rules.failure_cause: An AutoLISP association table was quoted as unevaluated CONS forms, so all entities kept the generic AICAD_GEOMETRY layer although their XData remained valid.
rules.prevention: Generate literal dotted pairs or an evaluated list, verify every ID resolves before SAVEAS, then reopen and compare exact per-layer counts plus ID-to-layer assignments.

rules.name: autocad_host_capability_compatibility
rules.requirement: Build scripts use only functions and ActiveX properties confirmed on the target AutoCAD host, with a command-based fallback for view centering and layout creation.
rules.failure_cause: Core Console lacked layoutlist and the AutoCAD 2025 viewport ActiveX object did not expose a writable ViewCenter property.
rules.prevention: Run a host capability probe, create isolated layouts deterministically, center views with MSPACE/ZOOM when necessary, and treat unsupported API members as a preflight failure rather than retrying blindly.

rules.name: preview_visual_hygiene
rules.requirement: The final opaque preview shows the full sheet with readable Chinese, dashed creases, no UCS/grid artifacts, no critical annotation overlap and no cropped production geometry.
rules.failure_cause: A numerically correct viewport can still expose UCS icons, use continuous-looking crease lines or place labels too close to auxiliary geometry.
rules.prevention: Disable viewport UCS/grid/snap, enforce plot linetype scaling, rasterize the actual named layout to white RGB and require an original-resolution visual inspection before status can pass.

historical_errors.symptom: All flaps appeared as rigid rectangles and slots as vertical single lines.
historical_errors.root_cause: The old 40-edge catalog was treated as complete visual truth even though it was a simplified coordinate catalog.
historical_errors.fix: Use image2 for topology semantics while retaining only explicit numeric dimensions from engineering data.

historical_errors.symptom: Rounded corners touched adjacent lines but had a small directional kink.
historical_errors.root_cause: Quarter-circle centers were offset by R in X/Y without solving tangency to the sloped slot edge.
historical_errors.fix: Replace approximate corners with exact two-ray fillet mathematics.

historical_errors.symptom: A correct reopened arc failed because AutoCAD stored 360 degrees as 0 degrees.
historical_errors.root_cause: The verifier compared serialization literally instead of modulo 360 geometric equivalence.

historical_errors.symptom: An early preview had a transparent background and missing Chinese text.
historical_errors.root_cause: The preview path converted text to unsupported output and did not force an opaque canvas.
historical_errors.fix: Require RGB white PNG plus SVG native text and perform an original-resolution visual check.

historical_errors.symptom: AutoCAD could not load a generated build LISP.
historical_errors.root_cause: Generated MTEXT contained U+000A and one nested IF lacked a closing parenthesis.
historical_errors.fix: Normalize MTEXT line breaks to \P, require ASCII, and balance parentheses before launch.

historical_errors.symptom: The actual glue zone and two tape-center reference lines were all green, so their purposes were indistinguishable.
historical_errors.root_cause: Layer assignment grouped entities by a broad sealing theme instead of by manufacturing action.
historical_errors.fix: Keep only the adhesive application rectangle on GLUE and move the two tape centers to gray non-plot TAPE_REFERENCE.

historical_errors.symptom: The initial generic A3 frame did not match the user's DWG margins and title-grid divisions.
historical_errors.root_cause: A standard template was assumed before the actual reference drawing was available and measured.
historical_errors.fix: Measure the reference as 420x297 mm, inner margins 25/5/5/5 mm, and a 180x40 mm title block with its exact row/column grid.

historical_errors.symptom: The framed layout contained duplicate viewports and then displayed only half of the dieline even though the viewport scale reported 1:5.
historical_errors.root_cause: The layout template supplied a viewport, MVIEW added another, and Target was combined with a retained ViewCenter.
historical_errors.fix: Keep one viewport, lock it at 1:5, set Target to the origin, verify full annotated extents and inspect the real AutoCAD layout.

historical_errors.symptom: The drawing contained dimension numbers but still looked manually annotated.
historical_errors.root_cause: Only the main width/height chain used DIMENSION entities; radius and manufacturing explanations remained ordinary text without a unified dimension style.
historical_errors.fix: Rebuild the sheet with ten native linear dimensions and one native radial dimension, exact measurements, no text overrides and AICAD_DIM IDs.

historical_errors.symptom: The title block was dimensionally correct but contained class, major, grade and student-ID example content.
historical_errors.root_cause: The reference title block was treated as content to copy rather than a grid whose cells needed project-specific semantics.
historical_errors.fix: Replace example content with school, category, drawing number, scale, name, unit, status, date, sheet and review fields; center each value in its cell.

historical_errors.symptom: Technical explanations were scattered around model space and some sat outside the production blank.
historical_errors.root_cause: All text was handled as free annotations without distinguishing local labels from sheet-level technical requirements.
historical_errors.fix: Keep only panel/flap labels in model space and move all general notes into a dedicated bounded technical-requirements panel inside the A3 frame.

historical_errors.symptom: One generated PDF preview was black and incomplete after a correct visual sheet had already been produced.
historical_errors.root_cause: The plot was launched while TILEMODE still selected model space, so the named paper layout was not actually the plotted context.
historical_errors.fix: Explicitly activate paper space and the named layout before every plot, remove stale outputs, then inspect the resulting full-page PNG.

historical_errors.symptom: Plugin entities reopened with valid AICAD XData but all remained on AICAD_GEOMETRY instead of CUT, SLOT, CREASE and GLUE.
historical_errors.root_cause: The generated AutoLISP layer table quoted CONS expressions instead of storing evaluated ID-to-layer pairs.
historical_errors.fix: Emit literal dotted pairs and make reopened per-ID layer reconciliation mandatory.

historical_errors.symptom: The first AutoCAD build stopped at layoutlist and a later layout pass failed on the unavailable ViewCenter property.
historical_errors.root_cause: GUI-oriented helpers and assumed ActiveX members were used without probing the AutoCAD Core Console 2025 host.
historical_errors.fix: Create the isolated layout directly and set the model view with MSPACE/ZOOM before applying supported scale and lock properties.
